United States.title: Heatwave affects Midwest and South US, causing power outages and water shortages
United States.summary: A prolonged heatwave has gripped the Midwest and South US, leading to power outages, water shortages, and health concerns.

United States.title: Supreme Court ruling on Roe v. Wade anniversary sparks protests and abortion clinic attacks
United States.summary: The anniversary of the Supreme Court's decision to overturn Roe v. Wade sparked protests and attacks on abortion clinics across the US.

United States.title: US Supreme Court ruling on student loan forgiveness sparks controversy and protests
United States.summary: The US Supreme Court's ruling on student loan forgiveness has sparked controversy and protests across the country, with many calling for the Biden administration to take action to protect student loan debtors.

South Korea.title: North Korea Fires Missile Over Japan
South Korea.summary: North Korea fired a ballistic missile over Japan on August 28-29, 2023, prompting the evacuation of two million people, according to the latest updates.

Japan.title: Japan's government announces expansion of missile shield
Japan.summary: Tokyo expands missile defense shield in response to North Korea's increasing missile tests.

Japan.title: Japan protests China's missile tests in disputed waters
Japan.summary: Tokyo lodges formal protest with Beijing over recent missile tests in disputed waters.

Japan.title: Japan sees rise in 'silent' abortions as abortion rights come under pressure
Japan.summary: Japan sees rise in women having abortions without hospital visits as strict laws and social pressures drive up 'silent' abortions
